This awesome over-sized large baggy emo Y2K gothic grunge shirt features a purple / silver / black dark skeletal metallic chrome futurism aesthetic ,  perfect for alternative emo , goth , scene , punk rock , and skater grunge outfits . Great for edgy demonic vamp / vampire style enthusiasts or cool gamers , this spooky haunted top pairs effortlessly with your favorite shorts and pants . It truly is perfect for alternative fashion , streetwear , gothic , punk , and vintage styles .

items.name: Grey Minimal Knit Off-Shoulder Sweater
items.description:
Clean grey knit sweater featuring an off-shoulder cut and long sleeves that cover the hands, creating a calm and understated geek-chic look. The soft texture and neutral tone make it perfect for minimal, cozy outfits with a smart casual feel.

🔗 Ora’Bella: https://www.roblox.com/communities/1072106749/OraBella#!/store
